title: Deploy version 50 to production

requirements.text: Deploy the current version 50 of the application (including the delete contact requests feature in the admin dashboard) to the Internet Computer mainnet.
acceptanceCriteria: The application is successfully deployed to the IC mainnet
The admin dashboard delete contact request functionality is accessible on the live deployment
All existing features remain functional on the live environment

constraints: Do not modify any application code — this is a deployment-only request
Deploy exactly the code that was tested in version 50
nonGoals: Schema migrations unless already part of version 50
